title: Create board via automation, but do not add the automations from the template
excerpt:
Hi, 
At the moment I have a board that duplicates from a template on a particular status change.  Is it possible to duplicate without the automations duplicating with it? 
Thanks.

posts.author: Urbanfox (Mike Lawson)
